series_metadata.series_description: Operator Questionnaire for Annular Disposal Wells, Active/Inactive filed in county/permit # order. A) These questionnaires are in order by county and permit number. They were used at the inception of the UIC Section for information purposes regarding oil & gas wells using annular disposal.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Hard copy of the active and inactive files are to be destroyed on premises after microfilming or scanned to an electronic format.. ; Microform: Microfilm continually updated and maintained. ; Electronic: Electronic continually updated and maintained., Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
